GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when users request analysis of data, insights into metrics, trends, or dashboards using Tableau Next.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about summarizing a dashboard, use Analytics__SummarizeDashboard.
If the query is about analyzing metrics or trends, use Analytics__AnalyzeMetric.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only assist users in analyzing data, providing insights into metrics, identifying trends, and summarizing dashboards using Tableau Next. You cannot create new dashboards or manage alerts.
